content: OperatorHub/OLM Capability Model defines 5 maturity levels: L1 Basic Install (CR fully provisions the app), L2 Seamless Upgrades, L3 Full Lifecycle (backup/failover/scaling), L4 Deep Insights (metrics/alerts/log processing/workload analysis), L5 Auto Pilot (auto-scaling, auto-healing, auto-tuning). Useful as a maturity yardstick even outside OLM/OpenShift — a v1 operator should target L1-L2 solidly and describe L3+ as roadmap.
